programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After nine years of medical school, a newly qualified doctor and his wife search for their Alabama dream home.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: A house that looks like a boat, a home with carpet up the walls and a place that looks like a UFO compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Betting on Paradise
programme.desc: With news threatening to derail the entire project, Steph and Luke come up with an emergency plan. But it all hinges on completing the casita suites.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan take on a decrepit house from Detroit's past. They hope to turn into a shining beacon of the city's sustainable and renewable future.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple looks to move out of their tiny Brooklyn rental and buy a home in New Jersey. She wants a historic house in the suburbs to start a family.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a listing in an upscale neighbourhood of Whittier, California.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on a couple's chopped-up ranch house to transform into a bold statement that celebrates rustic elements and a glam open concept.

programme.title: Betting on Paradise
programme.desc: With just days until the combined wedding and grand opening, the team kicks construction into overdrive. The knockout pool bar surpasses expectations.

programme.desc: After a $3 million lottery win, David helps a mother search for a starter home for her eldest daughter in Rochester, New York.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Greenville, South Carolina, family of six wants to move from their small townhouse into something bigger.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: Best friends return to flip a friend's rental in beautiful Park City, Utah.With some help from Chip and Jo, the girls take on a new set of challenges.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: A successful Connecticut mum tackles her first fixer and hopes it will empower her daughter to feel like she can do anything.

programme.title: Married to Real Estate
programme.desc: A family is anxious to get out of his mother's house and find a place of their own. They're looking for a home with an open design for entertaining.

programme.title: The Flipping El Moussas
programme.desc: Tarek and Heather get an insider deal from Tarek's mum on a house in Anaheim Hills, but it quickly becomes a greater venture than they expected.

programme.title: Married to Real Estate
programme.desc: Mike and Egypt look to get a family out of their tiny New York City apartment and into the perfect place in Marietta, Georgia.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn purchase a house in Manoa with a mould-infested room and major roof damage, and they must take on a second flip to cover the cost.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A young woman flies the nest for higher education in Edinburgh, Scotland. She wants traditional Scottish charm, but her mum is after practicality.

programme.desc: A retired Marine and his wife search for an oceanfront home that will fit their family of nine in Topsail, North Carolina.

programme.desc: Brad Pitt recruits Drew and Jonathan to help him surprise his friend and makeup artist of 30 years by renovating her detached garage.

programme.desc: A California couple faces a total gut job when they take on a Northern California fixer to be closer to family.

programme.desc: Kentucky couple's dreams of flipping homes to help restore their town leads them to a big project: a pre-Civil War home that's falling apart.

programme.desc: Brittany balances a family's specific tastes to find them the laid-back lifestyle in New Orleans' North Shore.

programme.title: Selling The Big Easy
programme.desc: Brittany searches the New Orleans suburbs to help a young family get the most for their money.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Fran Drescher teams up with Jonathan and Drew to upgrade outdated living spaces for her housekeepers of 30 years, whom she considers family.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin face their biggest project yet as they take on an iconic Laurel home with an interior that's on the brink of collapse.

programme.desc: Despite their project manager's numerous concerns, Tarek and Christina take the plunge with an Anaheim, Calif., trust sale property.

programme.desc: A twenty-something real estate agent and brain tumour survivor is eager to buy her first home in Nashville, Tennessee.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Anaheim, California that is being offered as an all-cash sale with no inspections and no contingencies.
